page_content:
CMSC737 Fundamentals of Software Testing (3 Credits)

Examine fundamental software testing and related program analysis techniques. In particular, the important phases of testing will be reviewed, emphasizing th significance of each phase when testing different types of software. Concepts include: test generation, oracles, prioritization and coverage, regression and mutation testing, and program analysis. Prerequisite: CMSC435; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department; or permission of instructor.
